name: Beef Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge the meat in flour.
2. Melt shortening in a skillet and add beef cubes, sautéing until evenly browned.
3. Transfer the browned beef to the Crock-Pot.
4. Add chopped onion, sliced carrots, minced garlic, bay leaves, salt, sugar, black pepper, paprika, ground cloves, lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, and water to the pot.
5. Stir the mixture.
6. Cover and cook on Low for 10-12 hours or on High for 5-6 hours.
7. Serve.
